notes: Two-leg XNG/CAD natural-gas trade relative-value basket from the approved EIA-CANADA-GAS-TRADE-2025_S01 card. The EA runs from the XNGUSD.DWX host setfile and reads XNGUSD.DWX and USDCAD.DWX D1 closes to compute a CAD-denominated gas spread z-score. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
